name: Convert Hardwario Temp
Check Backend Response
Prepare SQLite Insert
Button to mock temp
Load retry queue
Build Retry request
Handle Retry Result
Inject create SQLite table
topic: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS retry_queue (   id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,   measurementId TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,   payload TEXT NOT NULL,   createdAt TEXT NOT NULL,   retryCount INTEGER DEFAULT 0,   lastRetryAt TEXT );

name: README
info:
**1st step:** inject create SQLite table
**2nd step:** connect to your device
**3rd step:** in order to test the retry queue break both /gateway/measurement HTTP requests
**4th step:** send a measurement either via mocked button event or wait for real measurement
**5th step:** check whether the measurement was pushed in the retry queue via inject SELECT * FROM retry_queue
**6th step:** repair the previously broken /gateway/measurement HHTP reqeust
**7th step:** wait at most 60s until the retry fires
**8th step:** check whether the retry queue got deleted via inject SELECT * FROM retry_queue
